meta.title: Unlocking Bulgaria — Travel Through the Hidden Memory of Bulgaria
meta.description: A premium mobile app for exploring Bulgaria through real-world quests, cinematic storytelling, optional AR, historical routes, relics, and cultural discoveries. Become a Keeper.
meta.ogTitle: Unlocking Bulgaria — 1345 Years. One Name Survived.
meta.ogDescription: Travel through Bulgaria. Reveal the ancient secrets. Become a Keeper.

hero.question: How?
hero.lede: Travel through Bulgaria. Reveal the ancient secrets. Become a Keeper — a guardian of the living memory that has endured for thirteen centuries.
hero.mapLabel: Interactive map of Bulgaria's hidden memory
hero.phoneDesc: Visit the places where memory became statehood.

band.sub: Not a guide. Not a map. Not a game.
band.statement: A real-world journey through Bulgaria's living memory.

howItWorks.heading:
Become a Keeper,
one place at a time.
howItWorks.lede: Every journey in Unlocking Bulgaria follows a clear progression — from a single checkpoint to the full unlock of Bulgaria's hidden memory.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Visit a Checkpoint
steps.desc: Travel to a real place. Activate the checkpoint by arriving at the location. Unlock a story, a clue, or a hidden layer.

steps.label: Step 2 — 5 Checkpoints
steps.title: Complete a Route → Collect a Relic
steps.desc: Five connected checkpoints form a Route. Complete the route to receive a permanent digital relic — an artifact of Bulgaria's history.

steps.label: Step 3 — 3 Routes
steps.title: Unlock a Domain → Earn a Seal
steps.desc: Three routes unlock a regional Domain. Earn its Seal — a symbol of mastery over that region's hidden memory.

steps.label: Step 4 — 6 Domains
steps.title: National Unlock → Become a Keeper
steps.desc: Complete all six domains. Unlock the full memory of Bulgaria. Receive the title of Keeper — Пазител.

domains.heading:
Every region
hides a world.
domains.lede: Six regional domains form the map of Bulgaria's hidden memory. Each holds its own routes, relics, epoch, and final seal.
lures:
Where the Danube met the empire.
Fortresses remember what history forgot.

Pliska. Preslav. Tarnovo.
Three capitals. One name that never fell.

Ancient ports. Island monasteries.
Where the sea kept the secrets of the land.

Tombs of gold. Rose fields.
The oldest memory in the land.

Orpheus walked here.
The music still lives in the rocks.

Roman ruins beneath the city.
Every layer tells a different story.

cards.name: Domain of Stone and River
cards.key: Fortresses, rivers, Roman roads, and the Belogradchik stone formations — where the Danube defined the edge of empire.

cards.name: Domain of the Name
cards.key: Pliska, Preslav, Tarnovo — the three capitals that carried the name of Bulgaria through conquest, fire, and rebirth.

cards.name: Domain of the Sea Gate
cards.key: Ancient ports, capes, salt lakes, island monasteries — where Greek colonies met Thracian shores and the sea became a border.

cards.name: Domain of Kings
cards.key: Thracian tombs, ritual hills, rose fields, wine country, and golden artifacts — the oldest memory preserved in the land.

cards.name: Domain of Voice and Stone
cards.key: Orpheus myths, sacred caves, ancient bridges, stone villages, forests, and the oldest living music tradition in Europe.

cards.name: Domain of Crossroads
cards.key: Urban layers, Serdica ruins beneath the city, Vitosha mountain paths, ancient springs, and living markets.

guardianSight.heading:
See what
others cannot.
guardianSight.lede: Guardian Sight is the optional augmented reality camera mode inside Unlocking Bulgaria. Point it at the world — and see the hidden layer beneath.
guardianSight.sightBody:
Point the camera at the world.
The hidden layer appears beneath the real.
guardianSight.sightNote: Optional AR · Every moment has a non-AR path
guardianSight.ariaVisual: Guardian Sight AR interface — animated scanning rings

features.title: Symbolic traces
features.desc: Ancient symbols, glyphs, and route fragments appear over the real world at meaningful locations.

features.title: Checkpoint presence
features.desc: Nearby checkpoints pulse with light energy. The closer you are, the stronger the signal.

features.title: Always accessible
features.desc: AR is optional. Every AR moment has a full non-AR path with readable content, captions, and clear completion logic.

features.title: Heavier moments at key sites
features.desc: Hero checkpoints and domain finales feature deeper AR sequences — reconstructed scenes, artifact reveals, and cinematic moments.

timeline.heading:
The memory
that refused to die.
timeline.lede: 1345 years of Bulgarian history — compressed into the moments that defined the name, the faith, and the language.
timeline.sub: Follow the line. See what survived.

events.title: Khan Asparuh establishes the Bulgarian state.
events.body: By the Danube, a federation of Bulgars and Slavs forms the first Bulgarian state — recognized by the Byzantine Empire after a decisive military victory. The name Bulgaria enters history. A name that will survive everything that follows.

events.title: A new alphabet is born for the Slavic peoples.
events.body: Two brothers from Thessaloniki create the Glagolitic script — the foundation of the later Cyrillic alphabet. For the first time, the Slavic world has letters of its own. Bulgaria will adopt and preserve this legacy for centuries.

events.title: Khan Boris I accepts Christianity for Bulgaria.
events.body: In a calculated political act of profound cultural consequence, Khan Boris I converts Bulgaria to Christianity. A new identity forms around faith and literacy. Pliska and Preslav become centers of Slavic Christian civilization.

events.title: Old Bulgarian becomes the official language of state and church.
events.body: Under Tsar Simeon I, the Preslav Literary School flourishes. Old Bulgarian replaces Greek in all official contexts. Bulgaria becomes a literary and spiritual powerhouse at the center of medieval Europe.

events.title: Bulgaria falls — but the name endures.
events.body: Basil II conquers Bulgaria after decades of war. The Bulgarian state ceases to exist for 167 years. Yet the name, the language, and the memory survive — carried in monasteries, in villages, in oral tradition, in the stones themselves.

events.title: The Second Bulgarian Empire rises from Tarnovo.
events.body: Brothers Asen and Peter lead an uprising from the Tarnovo hills. Bulgaria is reborn — the only medieval Slavic state to reconstitute itself after complete conquest. The name survived. The memory returned. The journey continues.

features.heading:
Built for discovery,
not distraction.
features.lede: Every feature exists to deepen your connection with the real places you visit.

items.title: Real-world quests
items.desc: Routes built around real GPS checkpoints. The app guides you to the place — the place rewards you with its story.

items.title: Cinematic storytelling
items.desc: Each checkpoint reveals a narrative moment rooted in history, mythology, local memory, or natural heritage.

items.title: Guardian Sight AR
items.desc: Optional augmented reality reveals symbols, artifacts, and hidden layers overlaid on the real world.

items.title: Historical timeline
items.desc: An interactive map through 1345 years of Bulgarian memory — linked to the routes you walk.

items.title: Relics and artifacts
items.desc: Collect permanent digital relics at route completion. Build a personal archive of Bulgaria's hidden history.

items.title: Domains and seals
items.desc: Complete regional domains. Earn seals. Gradually reveal the full map of Bulgarian memory.

items.title: 14 languages
items.desc: Full multilingual support — including Bulgarian, English, German, Hungarian, Chinese, Greek, Russian, Japanese, and more.

items.title: Family exploration
items.desc: Pacing modes and content scales for families, schools, and cultural travelers of every age.

items.title: Offline support
items.desc: Key route content prepared in advance for mountain, village, and heritage sites with limited signal.

items.title: Partner routes
items.desc: Municipalities, museums, and tourism businesses can co-create routes tied to real local heritage.

download.heading:
Become a Keeper
of Bulgaria.
download.lede: The app is coming to iOS and Android. Join the launch list and be ready to unlock the first domains when the gates open.
download.trust: iOS & Android · Free to explore · Premium routes available

partners.heading:
Turn real places into
unforgettable journeys.
partners.lede: Unlocking Bulgaria helps destinations package cultural memory as a premium digital layer — sending visitors to real places, supporting local businesses, and strengthening regional identity.

benefits.title: Tourism promotion
benefits.desc: Create modern routes that make lesser-known places easier to discover. Extend the visitor journey beyond main attractions.

benefits.title: Cultural preservation
benefits.desc: Translate local stories, artifacts, traditions, and oral history into durable digital experiences that survive and travel.

benefits.title: Visitor engagement
benefits.desc: Increase dwell time, route completion, repeat visits, and cross-promotion with local hotels, restaurants, and guides.

partners.formSub: For municipalities, museums, tourism boards, schools, hotels, local guides, and businesses.

items.a: Unlocking Bulgaria is a premium mobile app for exploring Bulgaria through real-world quests, cinematic storytelling, optional AR layers, historical routes, collectible relics, and regional domains. It is built around one central question: how has the name of Bulgaria survived for 1345 years?

items.q: Is it a game or a travel guide?
items.a: Neither. It uses game-like progress systems, relics, and rewards — but the real product is cultural exploration in real places. It is closer to a cinematic museum experience combined with GPS navigation and historical storytelling.

items.q: Do I need to be physically in Bulgaria?
items.a: Most of the experience is designed for real-world exploration — visiting actual places in Bulgaria. However, the timeline, domain overviews, and some story content are accessible from anywhere to plan and prepare your journey.

items.q: Is AR required to use the app?
items.a: No. Guardian Sight AR is entirely optional. Every AR moment has a full non-AR alternative with readable content, captions, and clear completion logic. The core quest experience works completely without AR.

items.q: Is the app suitable for children?
items.a: Yes. The app is designed to be family-friendly with pacing modes, quiz-style content, and rewards that engage children. Routes support family groups, school trips, and cultural travelers of all ages.
The app supports 14 languages: Bulgarian, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Romanian, Turkish, Greek, Hungarian, Chinese, Russian, Japanese, and Serbian.
Basic exploration is available without an account. An account is required to save route progress, collect relics, track domain completion, and sync across devices.
Selected checkpoint previews are free. Full route access and domain bundles are available through in-app purchase. Pricing is premium and transparent — pay for what you want to explore.

items.q: Can municipalities and businesses partner with the app?
items.a: Yes. Municipalities, museums, schools, tourism businesses, hotels, and local guides can collaborate on route design, cultural validation, and visitor engagement programs. Use the partnership form to start the conversation.

items.q: Is the app available on Android and iOS?
items.a: Yes. Unlocking Bulgaria is being developed for both iOS and Android. Join the launch list on this page to be notified when the app is available in your region.

footer.tagline: A real-world journey through the hidden memory of Bulgaria.

memory.name: Bulgaria.
memory.post: A mystery that survived thirteen centuries.

items.name: Keeper
items.desc: The title earned by those who complete the full journey. Guardian of Bulgaria's living memory — Пазител.

items.name: Route
items.desc: Five real places. Connected by history. Walk the route — unlock the story hidden between them.

items.name: Relic
items.desc: Complete a route. Receive a permanent artifact. A piece of Bulgaria's memory that is yours forever.

items.name: Domain
items.desc: Six regions. Each holds its own routes, its own epoch, its own secrets. Reveal a domain — claim a layer.

items.name: Seal
items.desc: The mark of a completed domain. Six seals. Six layers of memory. All six — and Bulgaria is yours.

common.onlyInAppBody: AR scenes, riddles, relics, route unlocks, the full cinematic story, progress, and rewards stay exclusive to Unlocking Bulgaria.
